data.title: Fortis Inc. will discuss Q2 2025 results on August 1, with teleconference and webcast at 8:30 a.m. Key speakers included.
data.description: St. John's, Newfoundland and Labrador, July 24, 2025 - Fortis Inc. (TSX/NYSE: FTS) is set to announce its Q2 2025 financial results on August 1. A teleconference and webcast are scheduled for 8:30 a.m. (Eastern) on the same day. The discussion will involve David Hutchens, President and CEO, and Jocelyn Perry, EVP and CFO.

data.title: CAGW selected Missouri Governor Mike Kehoe as July 2025 Porker of the Month for diverting funds to KC sports stadiums.
data.description: The state of Missouri Governor, Mike Kehoe, has recently been dubbed the July 2025 Porker of the Month by Citizens Against Government Waste (CAGW). This title was given to Governor Kehoe due to his decision to allocate significant taxpayer funds towards NFL and MLB stadiums in Kansas City. Governor Kehoe, a Republican, has come under fire for this move and is facing criticism for his handling of taxpayer money.

data.title: Core manufacturing for 1.5 MW Pele microreactor starts in Lynchburg; expected to generate electricity by 2028.
data.description: BWX Technologies, Inc. has begun fabricating the reactor core for the Pele microreactor at their BWXT Innovation Campus in Lynchburg, Virginia. The Pele microreactor, a 1.5-megawatt demonstration unit for the Department of Defense Strategic Capabilities Office, is designed to produce electricity starting in 2028. This gas-cooled reactor is portable and intended for transportation.

data.title: Montrose Environmental Group (NYSE: MEG) to announce Q2 2025 results in Little Rock, Arkansas.
data.description: Montrose Environmental Group, Inc. (NYSE: MEG) has revealed the schedule for the release of its second-quarter 2025 financial results. The company, based in Little Rock, Arkansas, will make the announcement through Business Wire. Investors and interested parties can anticipate significant information regarding the performance and financial standing of Montrose Environmental Group, Inc. during this period.

data.title: Archer Aviation Inc. (NYSE: ACHR) to report Q2 2025 results on August 11, 2025, with a webcast at 2:00 pm PT. Phone: +1 404-975-4839 or +1 833-470-1428, code 100811.
data.description: In Santa Clara, California, Archer Aviation Inc. (NYSE: ACHR) is set to release its Q2 2025 operational update and financial results post-market closure on Monday, August 11, 2025. A live webcast to go over the results is scheduled for 2:00 p.m. PT. The webcast and replay can be accessed at investors.archer.com. For the conference call, dial +1 404-975-4839 (domestic) or +1 833-470-1428 (international), entering the access code 100811. Archer Aviation will present its financial figures and performance overview during this session.
